text.title: Product Development Trends 2026 Procedure
text.summary: Step-by-step procedure to apply the Product Development Trends 2026 methodology end-to-end. Each step lists input, action, output, and an optional decision gate.

step.name: collect-2026
step.action: Pull 2026 signals; drop any source older than 18 months.
step.decision-gate: Reject brief generation if pool < 12 sources across buckets.

step.name: verdict-per-bucket
step.action: Emit bet/monitor/ignore + kill criteria per bucket.

step.name: retro-2025
step.action: Compare 2025 bets to current 2026 verdicts; emit retro table.
